scenario.context: Station 02 of the day flow: Apply rights and duties in daily work.
scenario.mission: You handle typical daily situations with a focus on accountability, reporting and responsibility boundaries.

constraints: establish a clear link to rules

customerRequest.subject: Station 02: Rights and duties in daily work
customerRequest.body: Please assess typical daily situations in the company and show how duties, reporting paths and responsibility are implemented in practice.

questions.title: Duty-compliant follow-up response
questions.prompt: A ticket remains unattended because information is missing. What is the best step?

options.text: Request the missing information and document the case
Pass the problem to a colleague without a note

feedback.correct: Correct: asking and documenting are decisive here.
feedback.wrong: Not appropriate: responsibility and traceability must be maintained.

questions.title: Use reporting paths cleanly
questions.prompt: Which points indicate a clean reporting path? (Multiple selection)

options.text: Record the time and content of the report

feedback.correct: Correct: the reporting path is implemented reliably.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: please pay closer attention to responsibility and evidence.

questions.title: Handle a duty violation correctly
questions.prompt: Order the sequence when a duty violation is identified.

feedback.correct: Correct: the approach is clear and reliable.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: verify and document first, then inform and follow up.

questions.title: Calculate the handling window
questions.prompt: An incident must be handled in 30 minutes. 8 minutes are for intake, 11 for alignment. How many minutes remain for implementation?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the remaining time correctly.

questions.title: Duty-compliant response
questions.prompt: Formulate a short response (4-6 sentences) on how you report and work through an error in a duty-compliant way.
questions.expectedOutline: Reporting path, documentation and concrete corrective measure.

feedback.correct: Correct: the response is compliant and practical.
feedback.wrong: Please connect report, documentation and measure more clearly.
